findings.evidence: `rg` confirms the changed declarations are in `TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/CubeGenerator.lean:416,423,430,437,443,449,455,461`, while the PR description claims cleanup under `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/`.
findings.fix: Remove these CubeGenerator simp-attribute changes from this PR and submit them separately, or rescope the PR as one explicit cross-area simpNF cleanup.
findings.issue: This LowDimTopology plumbing cleanup is bundled with an AlgebraicTopology-only simpNF PR, so the PR has two topics.

summary: The PR is not a single coherent unit: the stated AlgebraicTopology simp-normal-form cleanup also edits LowDimTopology plumbing lemmas. Split the LowDimTopology simp-attribute cleanup into a separate PR or make this a clearly scoped repository-wide simpNF cleanup.
